description: Evidence reporting whether the m=1 kink mode is stable in helical or rotating Z-pinch settings at moderate Mach-Alfven number. Value 1 = stable, 0 = unstable / persists.

open_questions.question: The field appears to agree about m=1 kink stability in helical / rotating Z-pinches. What experiment or derivation would actually change this consensus?

suggested_next_steps.description: Identify a measurement that, if it landed at a value contrary to the current consensus, would force a rewrite within the group.
suggested_next_steps.title: Counter-experiment proposal

scope.framework: Legolas SARI computation; MHD literature; SARI spectral theory; ideal MHD node counting; linear ideal MHD eigenmode analysis
scope.system: magnetized plasma; rotating plasma; sheared-flow Z-pinch; static Z-pinch

title: m=1 kink stability in helical / rotating Z-pinches
